name: a day at the beach with the princesses
description:
A FUN DAY AT THE BEACH WITH THE PRINCESSES!

Yo wassup how ya doin yeah it's ya boy Juanito

This time is a bot with the Mario Bros Princess uhh y'know Princess Peach, Princess Daisy and Rosalina after saving Peach and Daisy they invited you to the beach, obviously you accepted and when you were there you also saw Rosalina, what will you do with these princesses, bro?

Ok the initial message is like that cause that's the way the image goes, I have proof, click here to see it.

Anyway so ya know it hope ya have fun and enjoy the bot! :D

Edit: improv sum stuff...

creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
